title: papaver argemone subsp. apulum
intro: Papaver argemone subsp. apulum, also known as the Argemone poppy, is a subspecies of the Papaver argemone plant, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of sanguinarine and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Papaver argemone subsp. apulum include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested under medical supervision.
